title: The long dark
premise: Psychological: the weight of a night alone.

stages.narration: The dark out here is total and it has a texture — every settling board and far-off sound arrives sharpened, and your own mind starts helpfully filling the gaps with worse. You catch yourself holding your breath to listen to nothing.

choices.label: Sit with it, breathe, wait for the light
Push the thoughts down and keep watch

notes: Reads/writes mind, all prose (non-audio). Scope run so it lands once.
